history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man stands in front of a modern building with large arched windows, wearing a blue t-shirt with a graphic design and pink stars, a white long-sleeved shirt underneath, baggy faded blue jeans, and a blue baseball cap. He is looking down, with his hands on the brim of his cap. To his left is a green signpost with "MOI" and "ASSEMBLY POINT" written on it, along with an icon of people and arrows, and text in Malay that reads "TEMPAT BERKUMPUL BILA TERJADI KEADAAN DARURAT" (Assembly point in case of emergency). The sign also has a small "P2K3" logo with a plus sign. The ground is wet, suggesting it might have rained recently. In the background, there's a tall building, palm trees, traffic cones, a green trash bin with wheels, and a yellow wet floor sign. The lighting is natural daylight, creating a slightly muted color palette with the dominant colors being green from the sign, blue from the man's clothing, and the grey tones of the building. The mood is casual and slightly urban, with a hint of caution due to the assembly point sign. The style is realistic, capturing the details of the scene.
